---
title: "VESS – Visual Evaluation of Soil Structure"
---

VESS is a field-based method for visually assessing soil structure quality.

| Item | Description |
|---|---|
| **What it is** | A practical visual scoring method for soil structure. |
| **Main purpose** | To help users judge structural condition in the field. |
| **Where used** | Field |
| **Typical users** | Farmers, advisors, field teams |
| **Typical outputs** | Visual structure score and qualitative field interpretation |

## Main target variables

- structural quality,
- visible signs of compaction,
- root and aggregate condition,
- and practical field interpretation.

## Descriptor groups supported

- structure,
- compaction,
- and support for water-behaviour interpretation.
